Employment Opportunities
No positions currently available

Thank you for your interest in working at Ontario Turtle Conservation Centre! We are not currently hiring for any positions.

We typically post summer positions in February each year, and occasionally have year-round positions come available.

We post on social media when we have positions available, so be sure to follow us there!

If you’re interested in volunteer opportunities, check out our Volunteer page or email volunteer@ontarioturtle.ca. We are always looking for Turtle Taxi Drivers and Turtle Care volunteers.
